subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaidens of God! Behold the bounty of the Lord of creation, Who hath endowed you with vision and insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیز الهی بخشش خداوند آفرینش بینید که شما را بینش داد و زیبایش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
